task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "确认用户使用的操作系统"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "指导用户打开文件资源管理器或Finder"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "在Windows系统中输入*.mp3进行搜索"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "在macOS系统中设置搜索条件为音乐或输入.mp3"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "建议用户按修改日期对文件排序"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "提示用户检查文件名是否有特殊符号或空格"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "如果未找到，询问用户更多线索（如操作系统版本、创建时间、关键词）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "加载音频文件并提取基本信息（声道数、采样率、时长等）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "生成音频波形图以检测削顶失真或长时间静音"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "计算音频平均音量并判断是否过低"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "检测音频中的静音段并标记可能问题"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "输出检测结果并保存波形图供用户参考"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "openFileManager"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "searchOnWindows"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "searchOnMac"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "sortFilesByDate"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "sortFilesByDate"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "checkFileName"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "requestMoreInfo"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "loadAudioFile"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "generateWaveform"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "calculateVolume"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "detectSilentSegments"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "outputResults"}]}
